summary: Good soundboard capture of a wild Phoenix show featuring a standout acoustic Black Peter and a memorable Lovelight, though the surprise guest’s antics marred Not Fade Away.
review: The recording is generally clear and listenable despite occasional volume spikes from an on‑stage impromptu vocalist. Musically the band delivers a hot performance highlighted by an exquisite acoustic Black Peter and a seamless transition into Lovelight, but the guest’s chaotic contributions detract from Not Fade Away and some blues improv moments.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show 4‑5 stars and praise several songs and overall performance; recording is consistently described as good, yielding an overall strong but not flawless rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and listenable; occasional volume fluctuations caused by the loud guest vocals, but no major drop‑outs or distortion reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Solid acoustic segment and a smooth transition into Lovelight, but the unexpected guest’s chaotic presence disrupts the early part of the set (Not Fade Away) and adds unevenness to the show.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His vocal tone is praised as sweet and musical; notable acoustic solo on Black Peter receives high praise.
band_member_comments.Bob: Described as crystal clear in one review; overall band chemistry noted as strong.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drums are called tight and well‑driven by reviewers.
